channel.title: Portfolios on MRI Coil Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolios on MRI Coil Lab

item.title: Low-cost inductively coupled wireless coil for MRI
item.description: Low-cost inductively coupled wireless coil for MRI

item.title: Research Focus
item.description: Dr. Yan’s research focuses on developing engineering solutions to the technical challenges in magnetic resonate imaging and MR-guided focused ultrasound, aiming to improve transmit field and B0 homogeneity, reduce the heating near implants, speed up the acquisition speed, reduce the motion artifacts and boost the imaging quality.
